texts.hudStateIdle: Tap / Click / Space to toggle turn
texts.title: CURVY SNAKE
texts.subtitle:
Reach {{target}} points to win.
Dodge your own tail. The world wraps around.
texts.hint:
Tap / Click / press Space anywhere to toggle your turn direction.
Eat glowing orbs to grow and score. Don't crash into your own trail.
texts.how_to_play: React fast, stay focused, and chase the highest score you can manage.
